# MegaProject Instructions

IMPORTANT: This is a React project with TypeScript. YOU MUST read everything below.

## Code style

- Use 2 spaces for indentation
- Use tabs for indentation in Makefiles
- Always use single quotes
- No semicolons
- Use trailing commas everywhere
- Maximum line length is 120 characters
- Write clean code
- Use meaningful names
- Keep it simple

## Project structure

```
project/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── Button.tsx
│   │   └── Modal.tsx
│   ├── utils/
│   └── pages/
├── public/
└── scripts/
```

## Setup

Run `npm install` then `yarn build` to get started.
Set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456 in your shell.

## Quality

IMPORTANT: Follow best practices.
- Handle errors appropriately
- Be careful when refactoring
- Write tests for all new features because quality matters here
- Write tests for all new features because quality matters here
- NEVER push directly to main
- Always run prettier before committing
- You must never use console.log in production code

IMPORTANT: quality is CRITICAL. YOU MUST take this seriously.
